title: LRC - JUIT
content: LRC Events Our Library vision is to provide comprehensive information resources and services to support  research, teaching, learning activities of the University. We regularly conduct  induction/orientation programs on search information, usage of database,  Digital Library (Institutional Repository), JUIT Publications Database,  avoiding plagiarism, using plagiarism detection tools etc. User Awarness/ Orientation Program User Orientation Program (2023) Springer Special Session 2023 User Orientation Program (2022) User Orientation Program (2021) User Orientation Program (2019) ACM User Awareness Program 2019 User Orientation Program (2018) Faculty Orientation 2018 IEEE User Awareness Program 11 Aug 2018 NDL Portal Registration NDLI Club  Registration Book Exhibition Annual  Book Exhibition (2019) Annual  Book Exhibition (2018) Annual  Book Exhibition (2018) Annual  Book Exhibition (2016) Bapu Samaran Nidhi 150th  Birth Anniversary of Mahatma Gandhi JI (2019) Library Professionals visit Library Professionals visit to LRC International Conference ETTLIS 2010 International  Conference Related Links e-Books@UGC Portal AICTE e-Kumbh Portal Abhilekh Patal Web Portal WebOPAC (KOHA) Digital Library (Institutional Repository) Library Guidelines for Submitting Theses & Project Reports JUIT Publications Information Search Request Form E-Resources (On Campus) E-Resources (Off Campus) Research Articles Request Form Print Journals New Arrivals Hilly Ramblings You Said it We Did it NPTEL (Home Page) NPTEL (Campus Access) NDL Shodhganga Delnet
